Description: Write deterministic C++ or Rust libraries for rcalib, rsigma, and Vt_full calculations.
Purpose: Create a single, unambiguous source of truth for all risk computations.
Key Components: ingest_rcalib.hpp; rsigma.hpp; lyapunov_ker.hpp; property tests for monotonicity and bounds

Description: Develop automated jobs that inject synthetic errors and failures into historical shards and verify system responses.
Purpose: Provide automated, empirical proof of monotonicity and Lyapunov properties; block regressions.
Key Components: Synthetic injection of N_missing and N_schema; verification that rcalib, Vt_full, and R weakly increase and K_adj and E_adj weakly decrease

Description: Formalize mathematical proofs and governance rules as ALN invariants with hex-stamps.
Purpose: Make governance rules transparent, cryptographically verifiable, and executable by the blockchain.
Key Components: safestep.aln for Lyapunov condition; invariant_kerdeployable.aln for KER gating rules; monotonicity lemma shards

Description: Build user-facing tools to visualize data-quality metrics alongside physical metrics.
Purpose: Translate abstract risk scores into actionable insights for operators and auditors.
Key Components: Ingest Quality Dashboard; rsigma Forensics Runner; rcalib trend visualizer

Description: Analyze how changes to data-quality corridors affect the overall Lyapunov residual and governance outcomes.
Purpose: Demonstrate the systemic benefit of improving data quality beyond the ingest plane.
Key Components: Derivative analysis of Vt_full with respect to corridor parameters; simulation of corridor tightening effects on K, E, and R

Description: Ensure that qpudatashard schemas carry all relevant metrics together in a single, auditable record.
Purpose: Enable holistic auditing of a window's performance by linking raw data, risk scores, and governance decisions.
Key Components: CyboquaticPhoenixEcosafety2026v2.aln schema carrying K, E, R, rcalib, rsigma, Vt, DeployDecision, and evidencehex
